# ServiceCode

```ts
// @ts-nocheck
// Code generated by protoc-gen-ts_proto. DO NOT EDIT.
// versions:
//   protoc-gen-ts_proto  v2.11.6
//   protoc               v5.29.3
// source: common/ServiceCode.proto

/* eslint-disable */

export const protobufPackage = "ServiceCommonCode";

export enum ServiceCode {
  /**
   * SUCCESS - Not an error; returned on success.
   *
   * common code range 1-100
   */
  SUCCESS = 0,
  /** UNKNOWN - server error */
  UNKNOWN = 1,
  /** USER_NOT_FOUND - user service */
  USER_NOT_FOUND = 100,
  USER_DB_ERROR = 101,
  USER_FETCH_ERROR = 102,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function serviceCodeFromJSON(object: any): ServiceCode {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "SUCCESS":
      return ServiceCode.SUCCESS;
    case 1:
    case "UNKNOWN":
      return ServiceCode.UNKNOWN;
    case 100:
    case "USER_NOT_FOUND":
      return ServiceCode.USER_NOT_FOUND;
    case 101:
    case "USER_DB_ERROR":
      return ServiceCode.USER_DB_ERROR;
    case 102:
    case "USER_FETCH_ERROR":
      return ServiceCode.USER_FETCH_ERROR;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return ServiceCode.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function serviceCodeToJSON(object: ServiceCode): string {
  switch (object) {
    case ServiceCode.SUCCESS:
      return "SUCCESS";
    case ServiceCode.UNKNOWN:
      return "UNKNOWN";
    case ServiceCode.USER_NOT_FOUND:
      return "USER_NOT_FOUND";
    case ServiceCode.USER_DB_ERROR:
      return "USER_DB_ERROR";
    case ServiceCode.USER_FETCH_ERROR:
      return "USER_FETCH_ERROR";
    case ServiceCode.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}
```
